content.introduction: In 2026, Microsoft, Alphabet, Meta, and Amazon are projected to spend over $670 billion in capital expenditures, primarily driven by AI investments. Amazon leads with $200 billion, followed by Alphabet at $180 billion, Meta at $125 billion, and Microsoft at $105 billion. This surge reflects the growing emphasis on artificial intelligence across these tech giants.
body: Amazon leads with $200 billion in planned spending, followed by Alphabet at $180 billion, Meta at $125 billion, and Microsoft at $105 billion.
